# AgentRouter OS

> CLI-first AI task-routing planner that classifies a task across 7 dimensions and recommends the best model, agent, or CLI/IDE tool with explainable scoring, a fallback, and a risk-scaled safety checklist. Local-first, no cloud or API keys required — everything is stored in SQLite with full decision replay, feedback learning, per-user telemetry, and a portable skill that plugs into agent hosts like Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, and Cursor.

Key features:
- Task classification across 7 dimensions (type, complexity, risk, context, output, tools, approval)
- YAML-driven model registry with live provider sync (OpenRouter, OpenAI) — routing never hardcodes a model name
- Scoring-based recommendations with plain-English reasoning and a fallback
- SQLite decision log with full replay (`explain`) and a bounded feedback learning loop
- Risk-aware gating: high-risk tasks always require human approval and never auto-execute
- Read-only local web dashboard with decision history and per-user stats
- Opt-in execution with provable high-risk blocking
- Team mode via shared `AGENTROUTER_HOME`: unified policy + per-user history (`AGENTROUTER_USER`)
- Agent skill integration: host agent decomposes a task, AgentRouter routes each subtask to a pricing tier, the host runs each on its cheapest adequate model (saves tokens)

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start with Installation](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#quick-start): Install, init, and route your first task in 5 minutes
- [Common Tasks](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#common-tasks): Override the classifier, replay decisions, generate prompts, refresh catalogs, feedback, execute, stats, JSON
- [Understanding the Output](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#understanding-the-output): The 7 classification dimensions and the scoring formula
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#troubleshooting): Common issues and exit codes

## Agent Host Integration

- [Use AgentRouter inside Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / Cursor](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#use-agentrouter-inside-claude-code-codex-antigravity-cursor): Auto/manual modes and the decompose-then-route protocol
- [integrations/README.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/integrations/README.md): Per-host install instructions
- [integrations/AGENTS.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/integrations/AGENTS.md): Host-agnostic protocol snippet to paste into any instruction file
- [Claude Code SKILL.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/integrations/claude-code/agentrouter/SKILL.md): The full skill (modes, decomposition, tier-to-model mapping, safety gate)

## Core Documentation

- [USER_GUIDE.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/USER_GUIDE.md): Full command walkthrough, JSON output contract, all flags
- [CLI_SPEC.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/CLI_SPEC.md): Complete command specification and argument details
- [ROUTING_RULES.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/ROUTING_RULES.md): Classification logic, scoring formula, risk rules, fallback strategy

## Configuration and Registry

- [Configuration](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#configuration): Custom weights (w_cap/w_cost/w_lat/w_ctx), policy caps, adding/retiring models, ability overrides
- [MODEL_REGISTRY_SCHEMA.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/MODEL_REGISTRY_SCHEMA.md): Model entry schema (source of truth) with all fields
- [PROVIDER_ADAPTER_SPEC.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/PROVIDER_ADAPTER_SPEC.md): Adapter contract with execution config

## Architecture and Design

- [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): Components, request lifecycle, data flow
- [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Secret handling, privacy, safety design, reporting
